14:  * Policy factory to create {@link YamlPolicy}. Yaml policy is read from storage, and it's required

17:  * policy:
18:  *   type: yaml_policy
19:  *   storage:

29:  * │   ├── jane.yaml
30:  * │   ├── ...
31:  *
32:  * @since 1.2
33:  */
34: @ArtipiePolicyFactory("yaml_policy")
35: public final class YamlPolicyFactory implements PolicyFactory {
36:

39:         final PolicyConfig sub = config.config("storage");
40:         try {
41:             return new YamlPolicy(
42:                 new BlockingStorage(
43:                     new Storages().newStorage(
44:                         sub.string("type"), Yaml.createYamlInput(sub.toString()).readYamlMapping()
45:                     )
46:                 )

31:  * @since 1.2

33: @ArtipiePolicyFactory("yaml_policy")
34: public final class YamlPolicyFactory implements PolicyFactory {
35: 
36:     @Override

5: package com.artipie.security.policy;

7: import com.amihaiemil.eoyaml.Yaml;
8: import com.artipie.asto.blocking.BlockingStorage;
9: import com.artipie.asto.fs.FileStorage;
10: import java.io.IOException;
11: import java.io.UncheckedIOException;
12: 
13: /**
14:  * Policy factory to create {@link YamlPolicy}. Yaml policy is read from storage, and it's required
15:  * to describe this storage in the configuration. Configuration format is the following:
16:  *
17:  * policy:
18:  *   type: yaml_policy
19:  *   storage:
20:  *     type: fs
21:  *     path: /some/path
22:  *
23:  * The storage itself is expected to have yaml files with permissions in the following structure:
24:  *
25:  * ..
26:  * ├── roles.yaml
27:  * ├── users
28:  * │   ├── david.yaml
29:  * │   ├── jane.yaml
30:  * │   ├── ...
31:  *
32:  * @since 1.2
33:  */
34: @ArtipiePolicyFactory("yaml_policy")
35: public final class YamlPolicyFactory implements PolicyFactory {
36: 
37:     @Override
38:     public Policy<?> getPolicy(final PolicyConfig config) {
39:         final PolicyConfig sub = config.config("storage");
40:         try {
41:             return new YamlPolicy(new BlockingStorage(new FileStorage(sub.string("path"))));
42:         } catch (final IOException err) {
43:             throw new UncheckedIOException(err);
44:         }
45:     }
46: }

30:  * │   ├── jane.yaml
31:  * │   ├── ...
32:  *
33:  * @since 1.2
34:  */
35: @ArtipiePolicyFactory("yaml_policy")
36: public final class YamlPolicyFactory implements PolicyFactory {
37: 
38:     @Override
39:     public Policy<?> getPolicy(final PolicyConfig config) {
40:         final PolicyConfig sub = config.config("storage");
41:         return new YamlPolicy(new BlockingStorage(new FileStorage(Paths.get(sub.string("path")))));
42:     }
43: }
